title: Conference Venue Site Visit Report
title_zh: 會議場地實地勘查報告

all.en: Internal Memorandum — Events Department, Site Visit Findings
all.zh: 內部備忘錄 — 活動部現勘結果報告

all.en: Prepared by: Olivia Tan, Senior Events Planner
all.zh: 撰寫人：資深活動企劃 Olivia Tan

all.en: Re: Selection of venue for the Annual Partner Summit, October 15-17
all.zh: 主旨：10 月 15 至 17 日年度合作夥伴高峰會場地遴選

all.en: Our team visited three shortlisted venues on April 8 and 9.
all.zh: 本團隊已於 4 月 8、9 兩日完成三處入圍場地之現勘。

all.en: Each site was evaluated on capacity, technical readiness, and overall service.
all.zh: 各場地依容量、技術整備度與整體服務進行評估。

all.en: Venue A is the Grand Pacific Hotel located in the financial district.
all.zh: 甲場地為位於金融區之 Grand Pacific Hotel。

all.en: It offers a main ballroom seating 480 attendees theater-style.
all.zh: 其主宴會廳可容納 480 人劇院式座位。

all.en: Six adjacent breakout rooms are available for parallel sessions.
all.zh: 另有六間相鄰之分組會議室可同步進行。

all.en: Audio-visual support includes 4K projection and live streaming capability.
all.zh: 視聽設備含 4K 投影及直播能力。

all.en: The in-house catering team accommodates dietary restrictions reliably.
all.zh: 場館內部餐飲團隊可妥善因應特殊飲食需求。

all.en: Daily rental rate is USD 18,500 inclusive of basic AV setup.
all.zh: 場地日租金 18,500 美元，含基本視聽設置。

all.en: Catering averages USD 95 per person per day with three meals.
all.zh: 餐飲平均每人每日 95 美元，含三餐。

all.en: Strengths: convenient location, polished service, strong technical staff.
all.zh: 優點：地點便利、服務細緻、技術人員素質佳。

all.en: Weaknesses: rigid layout, limited natural light, no outdoor space.
all.zh: 缺點：格局僵硬、自然採光不足、無戶外空間。

all.en: Venue B is Riverside Convention Center in the cultural quarter.
all.zh: 乙場地為位於文化園區之 Riverside 會議中心。

all.en: It features a modular main hall expandable to 600 seats.
all.zh: 其模組化主廳可擴充至 600 座位。

all.en: Eight breakout rooms surround a central foyer ideal for networking.
all.zh: 八間分組會議室環繞中央交誼廳，利於人脈交流。

all.en: The venue includes large windows and a riverside terrace.
all.zh: 場館擁有大面窗景與河畔露台。

all.en: AV systems are professional grade but require external operators.
all.zh: 視聽系統屬專業級，但須外聘操作人員。

all.en: Daily rental is USD 14,200 with AV operators billed separately.
all.zh: 場地日租 14,200 美元，視聽操作人員另計。

all.en: Operator service averages USD 2,800 per day for full coverage.
all.zh: 全程操作人員平均每日 2,800 美元。

all.en: Catering must be sourced from one of three approved vendors.
all.zh: 餐飲須由指定三家合作廠商擇一供應。

all.en: Strengths: spacious feel, flexible layout, attractive ambience.
all.zh: 優點：空間感佳、格局靈活、氛圍迷人。

all.en: Weaknesses: requires more coordination, vendor pricing varies widely.
all.zh: 缺點：需較多協調、廠商報價落差較大。

all.en: Venue C is the Skyline Conference Resort on the city outskirts.
all.zh: 丙場地為位於市郊之 Skyline 會議度假村。

all.en: The main auditorium seats 550 in tiered theater configuration.
all.zh: 主禮堂可容納 550 人階梯式劇院座位。

all.en: On-site accommodation includes 320 guest rooms at preferential rates.
all.zh: 場內備有 320 間客房，並提供優惠住房價格。

all.en: All breakout rooms feature integrated smart conference systems.
all.zh: 所有分組會議室皆內建智慧會議系統。

all.en: Catering is fully in-house with extensive menu customization.
all.zh: 餐飲完全由場館自行提供，菜單可大幅客製化。

all.en: Package rate is USD 320 per delegate per day, all inclusive.
all.zh: 整套方案每人每日 320 美元，全包。

all.en: Strengths: integrated stay, full service, immersive experience.
all.zh: 優點：住宿一體、服務齊備、體驗感佳。

all.en: Weaknesses: distance from city, 45-minute transfer required.
all.zh: 缺點：距市區較遠，需 45 分鐘車程接駁。

all.en: Evaluation Matrix scored each venue on ten weighted criteria.
all.zh: 評估矩陣依十項加權標準對各場地評分。

all.en: Capacity, technology, and catering received the highest weightings.
all.zh: 容量、科技與餐飲三項權重最高。

all.en: Venue A scored 78 out of 100 in total weighted points.
all.zh: 甲場地加權總分為 78 分（滿分 100）。

all.en: Venue B scored 84 out of 100 in total weighted points.
all.zh: 乙場地加權總分為 84 分（滿分 100）。

all.en: Venue C scored 87 out of 100 in total weighted points.
all.zh: 丙場地加權總分為 87 分（滿分 100）。

all.en: Cost analysis was conducted assuming 400 delegates attending.
all.zh: 成本分析以 400 位與會者為基準試算。

all.en: Total three-day cost for Venue A is approximately USD 169,500.
all.zh: 甲場地三日總成本約為 169,500 美元。

all.en: Total three-day cost for Venue B is approximately USD 142,800.
all.zh: 乙場地三日總成本約為 142,800 美元。

all.en: Total three-day cost for Venue C is approximately USD 384,000 with rooms.
all.zh: 丙場地三日總成本約為 384,000 美元（含住房）。

all.en: However Venue C eliminates the need for separate hotel bookings.
all.zh: 惟丙場地可省卻另訂飯店之需求。

all.en: Net comparison places Venue C only USD 12,000 above Venue B.
all.zh: 經淨額比較，丙場地僅較乙場地高約 12,000 美元。

all.en: Recommendation: Venue C, the Skyline Conference Resort.
all.zh: 建議方案：丙場地 Skyline 會議度假村。

all.en: The immersive format will enhance partner engagement significantly.
all.zh: 沉浸式形式可顯著提升合作夥伴參與感。

all.en: Shuttle costs are offset by reduced individual transport reimbursements.
all.zh: 接駁費用可由個人交通報銷節省抵銷。

all.en: Risk note: site distance may affect last-minute guest add-ons.
all.zh: 風險提示：地點距離可能影響臨時新增來賓之安排。

all.en: Mitigation: hold Venue B as contingency until confirmed bookings reach 350.
all.zh: 緩解措施：於確認報名達 350 人前，保留乙場地作為備援。

all.en: Action items proposed for management approval:
all.zh: 擬請管理層核可之行動項目：

all.en: Item 1: Sign letter of intent with Skyline by April 30.
all.zh: 項目一：於 4 月 30 日前與 Skyline 簽署意向書。

all.en: Item 2: Issue calls for proposals to all AV subcontractors.
all.zh: 項目二：對所有視聽分包商發出徵求建議書。

all.en: Item 3: Begin marketing collateral design with venue imagery.
all.zh: 項目三：以場地影像著手行銷文宣設計。

all.en: Item 4: Confirm catering menu sampling visit by May 10.
all.zh: 項目四：於 5 月 10 日前完成餐飲試菜訪視。

all.en: Budget approval requested at the executive committee meeting next Tuesday.
all.zh: 擬於下週二執行委員會會議申請預算核可。

all.en: Report concludes; recommendations submitted for executive review.
all.zh: 報告結束；建議已呈交執行層審議。
